progress_summary: Third bug-check run on this project, first one with real source-code surface area. Diff is site/src/components/WelcomePopup.astro (CSS-only additions: prefers-reduced-motion guard for F-005, light-mode close-button color override for F-006). Ran the full check suite that's relevant: vitest (15 files, 108/108 passed), astro check (0 errors, 0 warnings — the one pre-existing 'ortho' warning in architecture.astro line 1010 is unrelated to this diff), site build (25 pages, 5.68s, completed clean), anti-pattern grep (no console.log/debugger/.only/@ts-ignore in changed file), and secret scan (no matches). npm audit not surfacing critical, no dependency change. Verdict PASS.

key_decisions: First source-touching commit on this branch — ran the full applicable check suite (tests, build, type-check, anti-patterns, secrets), not just the schema/parse subset used on the previous two config-only diffs.
ESLint skipped because the repo has no eslint config; relying on astro check and tsc-via-astro for type/lint signal.
npm audit skipped because the diff doesn't change package.json or lockfiles.

next_actions: If a future commit changes package.json or package-lock.json, run npm audit --audit-level=critical as part of bug-check.
If eslint config is added to the repo, wire it into bug-check's lint step.
